name: weave-epub-reader
description: Standalone EPUB reader with bookshelf, deep links, and reading state persistence.

scripts.dev:fresh: npm run clean:cache && npm run dev
scripts.build: npm run check:encoding && node --max-old-space-size=4096 node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js build --mode production
scripts.i18n:export-tutorial: npx tsx scripts/export-tutorial-en.ts && npx tsx scripts/export-tutorial-zh.ts
scripts.check: npm run check:src-js-residue && npm run build && npm run check:bundle-footprint && npm run verify:plugin-scope
scripts.format: biome format --write src/main.ts src/views src/services/epub src/services/navigation src/services/premium src/services/ai/ai-action-config.ts src/services/ai/ai-host.ts src/components/epub src/components/modals/EpubBookshelfImportModal.ts src/components/settings src/config src/stores/ai-config.store.ts src/stores/epub-active-document-store.ts src/types/license.ts src/types/utility-types.ts src/utils/i18n src/utils/license-state.ts src/utils/licenseManager.ts src/utils/epub-leaf-utils.ts src/utils/weave-reader-access.ts src/utils/plugin-access.ts src/events src/tests
scripts.format:check: biome check --linter-enabled=false --organize-imports-enabled=false src/main.ts src/views src/services/epub src/services/navigation src/services/premium src/services/ai/ai-action-config.ts src/services/ai/ai-host.ts src/components/epub src/components/modals/EpubBookshelfImportModal.ts src/components/settings src/config src/stores/ai-config.store.ts src/stores/epub-active-document-store.ts src/types/license.ts src/types/utility-types.ts src/utils/i18n src/utils/license-state.ts src/utils/licenseManager.ts src/utils/epub-leaf-utils.ts src/utils/weave-reader-access.ts src/utils/plugin-access.ts src/events src/tests
scripts.lint: biome lint --apply-unsafe src/main.ts src/views src/services/epub src/services/navigation src/services/premium src/services/ai/ai-action-config.ts src/services/ai/ai-host.ts src/components/epub src/components/modals/EpubBookshelfImportModal.ts src/components/settings src/config src/stores/ai-config.store.ts src/stores/epub-active-document-store.ts src/types/license.ts src/types/utility-types.ts src/utils/i18n src/utils/license-state.ts src/utils/licenseManager.ts src/utils/epub-leaf-utils.ts src/utils/weave-reader-access.ts src/utils/plugin-access.ts src/events src/tests
scripts.lint:check: biome check --formatter-enabled=false --organize-imports-enabled=false src/main.ts src/views src/services/epub src/services/navigation src/services/premium src/services/ai/ai-action-config.ts src/services/ai/ai-host.ts src/components/epub src/components/modals/EpubBookshelfImportModal.ts src/components/settings src/config src/stores/ai-config.store.ts src/stores/epub-active-document-store.ts src/types/license.ts src/types/utility-types.ts src/utils/i18n src/utils/license-state.ts src/utils/licenseManager.ts src/utils/epub-leaf-utils.ts src/utils/weave-reader-access.ts src/utils/plugin-access.ts src/events src/tests
scripts.verify:obsidian-community: npm run lint:obsidian && npm run lint:obsidian:strict
scripts.verify:community: npm run verify:obsidian-community && npm run lint:obsidian:community && npm test && npm run build
